title: Human Player Mobs
description: [ Java Port ] turns all mobs into humans, waifu and husbando, girl and boy
body: ### Due to some unfortunate circumstances and situations, 26.1+ updates for my 2 of my human mobs resource pack will be only available on Patreon behind a 5$ subscription from now on. ### If you are on 26.1, and you wanna play Minecraft 26.1+ with this pack, you can click on the button to Patreon and have access for a 5$ monthly subscription. For every 5$ is an additional support. Thank you if you do. [](https://www.patreon.com/cw/CmdrMCNuggets/membership) ## [Requires Optifine] ## [For Fabric, Forge, & NeoForge Users:] (Recommended) https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features https://modrinth.com/mod/nopackcompatcheck [Instructions, Lists, & Micro-Packs Available In This Link: https://www.mediafire.com/folder/m413i3qspxbhc/Micropacks . Make Sure To Unzip The .rar File After You Download] If you want the optimized bedrock port of this pack in particular, you can download it here: Link Removed: https://www.mediafire.com/folder/qmzpbh3krcjr7/Minecraft_Bedrock_Nugget_Packs Due to complexities, Human Player Mobs will be fragmented into 4 different packs, This pack, Human Era: Villagers & Illagers, Human Era: Vanilla Military, & Centaur Horse & Spider pack, in order to have full experience, download the 4 packs and arrange it in this order when applying ingame: Top= Human Player Mobs Middle1= Centaur Horse & Spider Pack Middle2= Human Era: Vanilla Military (Optional, author's suggestion) Middle3= Tactical 3D PVP (Optional, author's suggestion) Bottom=   Human Era: Villagers & Illagers Pack Description: This resource pack turns normal vanilla mobs into player models with female and male variants, and instead of just player textures of vanilla mobs, it redesigns the mobs into more human like, with the eyes, hair, and some other player skins, along with alot of variants. This is also a template pack for people that wanna turn a mob to a human player model for whatever reason. Some of the designs of the mobs might not look like what you'd expect for packs like these, cuz personal choices, so i'm just giving some mobs some certain amount of details. I dont know if i can classify this as a "waifu pack" or "moe pack", cuz it's just player models, and not a more slimmer figure, so for now, this is an "idk what this is suppose to be, but people like it somehow" pack, but since it contains girl mobs and boy mobs, i guess this can be a "waifu pack" in some way. **[PACK] HOW TO USE THESE "MICROPACKS":** Micropacks are small resource packs that modify the model and spawn variants of the pack, to do this, you download the micropacks found on the green text description above, extract the micropacks folder, and then select any micropacks that you want to use, and then drag them on resourcepacks folder, and then apply above the main pack file. If the micropacks show errors, press fn+f3+t, if it still is broken, please message me on Curseforge or PlanetMinecraft **[PACK] HOW TO MAKE MOBS SPAWN ONLY FEMALE OR MALE GENDER:** Open the micropacks file, go to texture spawn folder, go to gender benders folder, go to either male or female only folder, pick the male or female only zip file and drag it to resourcepacks folder, and then apply it above the main pack file ingame. **[PACK] HOW TO USE THIS ON 1.20.1:** Follow the instructions about Micropacks, and then go to Old Version Fixers, and then you are met with a txt file that contains instructions on how to apply it. **[PACK] HOW TO REMOVE CERTAIN MOBS:** If you are on java, open the pack file and do the following: assets/minecraft/textures/entity , delete whatever mob you want to delete assets/minecraft/optifine/cem , delete whatever mob you want to delete assets/minecraft/optifine/random/entity , delete whatever mob you want to delete (If it doesnt work, then i have no other solutions) PMC Account: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/stalkermcnuggets/ [Resource Pack Official Credits: Link Removed: https://www.mediafire.com/folder/czsxvrynmgup5/Credits ]
